audit_items.proof_trace: Storage contains data columns verified via RPC by_root (ByRootRequestDataColumnSidecarRequirements: 3 checks) mixed with gossip-validated columns (GossipDataColumnSidecarRequirements: 12 checks). RPC by_root handler serves from storage without re-validating gossip requirements, potentially serving columns for blocks that fail proposer signature, parent validity, or finality checks.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker provides data column via RPC with valid KZG/inclusion proofs but invalid proposer signature. Node saves to storage, later serves it to peers via by_root RPC, violating the invariant that served sidecars must pass full gossip validation.
